LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NINA GATES' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL IS CONTINUED FROM APR-25-2014 TO APRIL 30, 2014 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN APRIL 25, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. COUNSEL PROVIDED THE COURT WITH A COPY OF THE PROOF OF SERVE. FOR GOOD CAUSE AND TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT, THE COURT VACATED THE TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT NINA GATES' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE DENIAL OF ATTORNEYS FEES WAS CONTESTED BY THE MOVING PARTY. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF LIBERTY LIFE ASSURANCE COMPANY OF BOSTON'S MOTION FOR ORDER OF DISCHARGE AND AWARD OF ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED AS TO ORDER OF DISCHARGE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO AWARD OF ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CCP 386.6. MOVING PARTY HAS NOT SUFFICIENTLY SHOWN THE BASIS FOR THE REQUESTED $6,348.89 IN COSTS, OR $10,985 IN ATTORNEY FEES. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-03-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Set Aside Dismissal;
Off Calendar Apr-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Sarah Wessels, Esq. for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was argued. Counsel provided the Court with a copy of the proof of serve. For good cause and to the satisfaction of the Court, the Court vacated the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT NINA GATES' Motion To Set Aside Dismissal is granted. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Set Aside Dismissal;
Off Calendar Apr-25-2014 Continued To Apr-30-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT NINA GATES' Motion To Set Aside Dismissal is continued to April 30, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 25, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2013 Dismissal - No Appearance

Notice Of Motion For Order Of Discharge And Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Blake Russum, Esq. of Ropers Majeski Kohn Bentley, Tel. 650.780.1605, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The denial of attorneys fees was contested by the moving party. After hearing, the court modified its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LIBERTY LIFE ASSURANCE COMPANY OF BOSTON's Motion For Order Of Discharge And Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs is Granted as to order of discharge. No opposition filed. Denied WITHOUT PREJUDICE as to award of attorneys fees and costs pursuant to CCP 386.6. Moving party has not sufficiently shown the basis for the requested $6,348.89 in costs, or $10,985 in attorney fees. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
